import io
import string

value ParseResult
  index: Int
  value: Int
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  i
end

fn parse_int_at(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> ParseResult
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = skip_ws(s, start)
  mut sign = 1
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  mut val = 0
  mut reading = true
  while i < n and reading
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        i = i + 1
      else
        reading = false
      end
    when None
      reading = false
    end
  end
  ParseResult(index: i, value: val * sign)
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let r1 = parse_int_at(input, 0)
let r2 = parse_int_at(input, r1.index)
let r3 = parse_int_at(input, r2.index)
let a = r1.value
let b = r2.value
let s = r3.value

mut x = a
mut out = ""
mut first = true
while x < b
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
  x = x + s
end
println(out)
